message:
feat(math): expand core math implementations for exp, float, special, and trig families

Extends the glibc-rs-core math library with additional function implementations
toward glibc compatibility:

- exp.rs: +37 lines adding exp2, expm1, and ldexp variants with proper
  edge-case handling for subnormals, infinities, and NaN propagation
- float.rs: +44 lines adding float classification (fpclassify, isinf, isnan,
  isnormal), frexp, modf, and significand extraction
- special.rs: +83 lines adding gamma (tgamma, lgamma with sign), erf/erfc
  error functions, and Bessel functions (j0, j1, y0, y1) with pole handling
- trig.rs: +59 lines adding inverse trig (asin, acos, atan, atan2), hyperbolic
  (sinh, cosh, tanh), and inverse hyperbolic (asinh, acosh, atanh) functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
